outcome: Success. MidpointX-prod execution pipeline rewritten to dynamically support MCP tools rather than defaulting strictly to executed_system_commands.
patterns: Hardcoded prompts instructing local execution scripts caused rigid behavior, ultimately overriding specific tooling plugins loaded in memory.
Web fetching with raw 'curl' in Windows PowerShell fails immediately against modern Cloudflare/Bot-Deterrent protected APIs like Yelp.

corrections.proposed_fix: Modified cognitiveNodes.ts to inject mapped MCP tools onto prompt generation phase; altered executionNodes.ts to utilize .bindTools([PluginRegistry.activeTools])
